commit_message:
[silicon_creator,drivers] Add hmac/kmac tests for unaligned inputs [silicon_creator,drivers] Add hmac/kmac tests for unaligned inputs feat:  Add a test that can hash256 unaligned inputs

As defined by the HMAC/KMAC specs, the hashing algorithm should be able to reproduce a digest that is identical to an aligned/unaligned input. 

Test:
Device under test: cw340 w/ HyperDebugger
CMD: bazel test --test_output=streamed --cache_test_results=no //sw/device/silicon_creator/lib/drivers:kmac_functe
